channel.title: FancyTextPaste — Free Online Tools
channel.description: Free fancy text generator for social media. Unicode fonts, symbols, and text styles.

item.title: LinkedIn Text Formatting Guide - Bold, Italic & More
item.description: Complete guide to LinkedIn text formatting. Learn how to bold, italicize, add bullet points, and use special characters in LinkedIn posts and profiles.
